publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-02-09 23:59:08 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Diaries, Financial Records, Printed Materials, Publications, Reports.
did.abstract: Collection development records, vendor correspondence, and permanent records of the library of the New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Also old Mann Library plaque.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Philip Bahr, March 2008Daniel W. Young, February 2010

emph.ref: Series II. Correspondence, Sam Demas Day Files
Series III. Correspondence, Jan Olsen Appointment Books and Day Files
Series V. Meeting Minutes, Reports, and Statistics

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Mann Library records, #21-6-2748. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, reports, meeting minutes, collection development records, building project records, and various other administrative records of the library of the New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences and the New York State College of Human Ecology. Also old Mann Library plaque.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes scrapbooks documenting the Ari van Tienhoven Award (1987-2011).
